title: velleia exigua
intro: Velleia exigua, also known as the narrow-leaf velleia, is a small, herbaceous perennial plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Velleia exigua include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of Velleia exigua can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by making a topical cream or ointment to apply directly to affected areas.
